narrative:
Perkins Twp township has 8,955 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.5 percentage points.
